title: planotia elata
intro: Planotia elata, also known as the Australian tea tree or mountain tea, is a shrub native to the eastern coast of Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are found in its leaves. The health benefits of Planotia elata include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Planotia elata typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
